name: Citation Coverage Checker
description: Verify that every factual claim in the generated content is backed by a citation to a valid source URL.
usage_notes: Run after content-writer and content-analyzer. Checks that inline [#n] citations in content_markdown match source_citations in analysis_json. Flags factual claims (numbers, dates, statistics) that lack citations. Set verify_urls to true to check that source URLs are still live (adds HTTP cost).

options.name: pass_threshold
options.label: Pass threshold
options.description: Minimum citation_score (0-1) for qa_pass to be true. 1.0 means every factual claim must have a citation.

options.name: verify_urls
options.label: Verify source URLs
options.description: Send HEAD requests to each source URL to check it is still live. Adds HTTP cost and latency.

options.name: require_factual_citations
options.label: Require citations on factual claims
options.description: Flag sentences containing numbers, dates, statistics, or company-specific claims that lack an inline citation.
